Table of Contents

Enum esriDisconnectedEditingError

Namespace
ESRI.ArcGIS.GeoDatabaseDistributed
Assembly
ESRI.Server.GeoDatabaseDistributed.dll

Disconnected editing error codes.

[Guid("C32846AD-806D-4C46-AFC1-A4395E7242F4")]
public enum esriDisconnectedEditingError

Fields

E_CAN_NOT_REUSE_SCHEMA_OF_VERSIONED_DATA = -2147219449

-2147219449: Cannot reuse schema of versioned data during extracting or checking out data.

E_CAN_NOT_REUSE_SCHEMA_WITH_OUTPUT_SPATIAL_REFERENCE = -2147219447

-2147219447: Cannot reuse schema with an output spatial reference.

E_CHECK_IN_INVALID_GEODATABASE = -2147219454

-2147219454: Invalid CheckOut Geodatabase.

E_CHECK_IN_NOT_SUPPORTED_IN_RELEASE = -2147219450

-2147219450: Checking in data is not supported on this geodatabase release.

E_CHECK_OUT_INVALID_DATA = -2147219448

-2147219448: Cannot checkout readonly or non versioned data.

E_CHECK_OUT_INVALID_SOURCE_WORKSPACE = -2147219445

-2147219445: Cannot checkout personal or ArcSDE release prior to (1, 3, 0).

E_CHECK_OUT_NON_VERSIONED_DATA = -2147219455

-2147219455: Cannot check out non versioned data.

E_CHECK_OUT_NOT_SUPPORTED_IN_RELEASE = -2147219451

-2147219451: Creating check-outs is not supported on this geodatabase release.

E_CHECK_OUT_UNREGISTER_FAILED = -2147219446

-2147219446: Failed to unregisted check-out.

E_GEODATABASE_HAS_CHECK_OUT = -2147219453

-2147219453: Geodatabase has already a checkout data.

E_INVALID_REPLICA_DESCRIPTION = -2147219452

-2147219452: Replica description object is not properly initialized.

E_SYNCHRONIZE_INVALID_RELEASES = -2147219444

-2147219444: Geodatabase releases of the master geodatabase and the checkout geodatabase should match.

E_TRANSFER_DELETE_TO_DATASET = -2147219442

-2147219442: Error in transferring delete to dataset.

E_TRANSFER_INSERT_TO_DATASET = -2147219441

-2147219441: Error in transferring insert to dataset.

E_TRANSFER_UPDATE_TO_DATASET = -2147219440

-2147219440: Error in transferring update to dataset.

E_UPDATEGRAM_TOPOLOGY_DEFINITION_ACCESSING = -2147219443

-2147219443: Error in accessing UpdateGram's Topology Definition element.

S_DE_OK = 0

0: Successful Disconnected Editing operation.
